original_thesis: Decomposition breaks the problem; root-cause goes deep; dialectical reasoning tests the explanation; causal-attribution-resistance prevents premature closure. This stack defeats just-so stories.
what_this_stack_defeats: Narrative fallacy, post-hoc rationalization, surface-level diagnosis
notes: Strongest diagnostic stack. Core trunk shared by 5+ superclusters. Thesis is accurate. Dialectical reasoning mentioned in thesis but not a member — minor, the core claim holds without it.
